title: alamya-health/ont-fshd-wf
description: Tower-friendly modular Nextflow workflow for D4Z4 / DUX4 facioscapulohumeral dystrophy profiling from either aligned BAM input or a folder of unaligned BAMs.

sample_id.description: Single-sample identifier when not using a samplesheet.

report_only.description: Skip alignment/classification/calling and rebuild the HTML report from an existing published workflow output tree.

report_only_input_root.description: Root directory or object-store prefix of an existing ont-fshd-wf output tree to use when report_only is enabled.

reuse_input_t2t_alignment.description: Reuse the provided aligned BAM directly if it is already T2T-aligned and indexed.

input_aligned_bai.description: BAM index for aligned BAM input.

input_ubam_dir.description: Directory containing one or more unaligned BAM files.

t2t_ref_fasta.description: T2T-CHM13v2.0 FASTA used for alignment and methylation.

t2t_ref_mmi.description: Optional prebuilt T2T minimap2 MMI index. Leave blank to have the workflow build and publish a reusable MMI from the FASTA once per run.

blast_db_dir.description: Directory containing the DUCKS4 BLAST database files.

fshd_locus_bed.description: BED file for locus extraction on T2T coordinates.

methylation_regions_bed.description: BED file for summary methylation interpretation on T2T coordinates.

methylation_pileup_bed.description: BED file describing the broader D4Z4 regions to include in modkit pileup for repeat-resolved methylation visualization.

run_methylation.description: Attempt modkit-based methylation profiling after repairing MM/ML tags onto the T2T-aligned subset BAMs.

contraction_threshold_ru.description: Threshold used in the HTML report to flag a complete 4qA read as contracted.

minimap2_preset.description: Minimap2 preset used when aligning BAM/uBAM reads to T2T.

align_bam2fq_threads.description: CPU threads used for BAM-to-FASTQ conversion before T2T alignment.

align_map_threads.description: CPU threads reserved for minimap2 during T2T alignment.

align_sort_threads.description: CPU threads reserved for samtools sort/index after T2T alignment.

align_minimap_batch.description: Minimap2 -K batch size. Larger batches can improve CPU utilization at the cost of additional RAM.

methylation_sort_threads.description: CPU threads used for samtools sorting/indexing during methylation repair and pileup prep.

methylation_pileup_threads.description: CPU threads used by modkit pileup.

methylation_interval_size.description: Modkit pileup interval size for region-parallel processing. Smaller values can help on compact high-depth loci.

profile_fshd_methylation_image_tag.description: Optional ECR tag override for PROFILE_FSHD_METHYLATION only. Leave blank to use the global image_tag.

output_dir.description: Base output directory or object store prefix for published files.
